actionLibraryList.title: Mat Knee Pressure
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with knees bent and feet lifted, knees slightly apart at hip-width. Place your hands on your knees, keeping the pelvis and spine neutral. Inhale to prepare.
2.Press your hands down against your knees while simultaneously pushing your legs upward against your hands, creating opposing tension. Keep the core engaged and the torso stable.
3.Maintain smooth, natural breathing while sustaining the opposing pressure and body stability.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688733999.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck, allowing them to sink downward."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly throughout.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching or sagging the lower back.
2.Do not hold your breath; maintain steady breathing.
3.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Shoulder Bridg
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with a neutral spine and pelvis, feet hip-width apart on the mat. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, posteriorly tilt the pelvis and articulate the spine sequentially from the tailbone upward, engaging the glutes to lift the hips until full hip extension is achieved.
3.Inhale, maintain the top position, extending through the spine.
4.Exhale, control the descent, articulating the spine sequentially from the thoracic vertebrae down to the sacrum, returning to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688712470.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck, keeping the shoulder blades stable and pressed downward.\n2.Keep the lower limbs firmly planted and still."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and articulate the spine.
Inhale to hold and stabilize the top position.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid rib flaring or pelvic rotation.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side-Lying Clam
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side in a neutral spine position. Relax the chest, align the head, torso, and legs in a straight line, with heels together. Engage the core. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, lift the top leg, engaging the glutes to abduct while keeping the pelvis vertical and stable.
3.Inhale, control the return as the leg lowers back to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689370239.jpg","context":"1.Allow the shoulders to relax and sink naturally.\n2.Keep the pelvis vertical to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and engage.
Inhale to lower and return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid tilting or rocking forward/backward.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.
3.Maintain control throughout; avoid losing tension during lowering.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side Knee Plank
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Set up in a kneeling side plank with the bottom hand under the shoulder and wrist aligned with the shoulder joint. Stack the top leg straight on top or lightly touching the mat. Keep the pelvis stacked vertically and the spine long in a straight line, extending the top arm toward the ceiling. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engaging the core and keeping the scapulae stable and depressed. Press through the bottom hand to lift the pelvis off the mat, forming a straight line from head to knee (or foot). Maintain even breathing while holding the position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690845223.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine with a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale to lift and support. Maintain even breathing in the plank.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid sagging the lower back or tilting the pelvis forward or backward.
2.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or pressing the neck.
3.Avoid forming a “V” shape with the body.

actionLibraryList.title: Shoulder Bridge
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart, arms resting naturally at your sides, and engage the core. Inhale to prepare. Exhale, engage the glutes, tilt the pelvis posteriorly, and roll the spine up segment by segment from the tailbone, lifting the hips into Bridge. Feel the band gently pulling, creating a stretch through the hips and spine.
2.Inhale, hold at the top of the Bridge, open the chest, and keep the pelvis stable.
3.Exhale, control with the core, and roll the spine back down segment by segment from the thoracic spine to the sacrum.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688015438.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Keep the feet stable on the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift up, then return down.
Inhale, hold at the top.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid sagging the lower back or flaring the ribs.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and avoid excessive neck tension.

actionLibraryList.title: Shoulder Bridge with Straight Arms
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Place your feet firmly on the floor and engage the core. Exhale, engage the glutes, tilt the pelvis posteriorly, and roll the spine up segment by segment into Bridge.
2.At the top of the Bridge, inhale and extend the arms upward, lifting them vertically. Keep the shoulder blades stable and shoulders relaxed.
3.Exhale, control with the core, and slowly roll the spine back down to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688059055.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Keep the feet stable on the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift up, then return down.
Inhale, hold at the top.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid sagging the lower back or flaring the ribs.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and avoid excessive neck tension.

actionLibraryList.title: Shoulder Bridge Single Leg
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Place your feet firmly on the floor and engage your core. Exhale, activate the glutes, tilt the pelvis posteriorly, and roll the spine up segment by segment into Bridge.
2.At the top of the Bridge, bend one knee and hip to lift a leg, extending the lower leg along the band away from you, keeping the pelvis stable.
3.Exhale, control the hip flexion, and roll the pelvis down segment by segment to the mat. Lower the lifted foot back to the floor and return to double-foot support.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688122676.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Keep the supporting foot stable on the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift up, then return down.
Inhale, hold at the top and lift one leg.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid pelvic wobbling and losing core or glute stability.
2.Avoid sagging the lower back or swinging the leg when lifting.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Hip Adduction
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, engage the core, and lift the top leg using the outer glutes; raise only as high as the pelvis remains level.
2.Inhale, resist the band’s tension, and slowly lower the leg back to parallel with the body, maintaining consistent tension.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—avoid rocking or moving due to band resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628348949.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders.\n2.Keep the top leg straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift.
Inhale to lower.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the inner thighs and hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your pelvis stable—don’t let it tilt or rotate.
2.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.
3.Maintain control during the eccentric phase.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying leg press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side with both knees slightly bent. Lift the top leg to hip height. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale as you straighten the top leg and kick it out, reaching long away from the body.
3.Inhale as you bend the leg with control, drawing the strap back to return to the starting position. Repeat the movement, keeping the rest of the body stable and still.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1771061324580.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep the pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and apply force.
Inhale to return with control.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; don’t let it shift or tilt.
2.Keep the shoulders down.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Small Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Keep the top leg straight and kick it forward, then make a small outward circle as it approaches a 45° angle.
2.Exhale. Extend the straight leg backward, slightly past the midline, and draw a circle back to the center with legs together. Focus on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable; only the working leg moves.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628502797.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep your pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Stabilize the pelvis; no shifting or tilting.
2.Shoulders down and relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Hip Adduction
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, engage the core, and lift the top leg using the outer glutes; raise only as high as the pelvis remains level.
2.Inhale, resist the band’s tension, and slowly lower the leg back to parallel with the body, maintaining consistent tension.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—avoid rocking or moving due to band resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628348949.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders.\n2.Keep the top leg straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift.
Inhale to lower.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the inner thighs and hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your pelvis stable—don’t let it tilt or rotate.
2.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.
3.Maintain control during the eccentric phase.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying leg press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side with both knees slightly bent. Lift the top leg to hip height. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale as you straighten the top leg and kick it out, reaching long away from the body.
3.Inhale as you bend the leg with control, drawing the strap back to return to the starting position. Repeat the movement, keeping the rest of the body stable and still.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1771061324580.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep the pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and apply force.
Inhale to return with control.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; don’t let it shift or tilt.
2.Keep the shoulders down.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Small Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Keep the top leg straight and kick it forward, then make a small outward circle as it approaches a 45° angle.
2.Exhale. Extend the straight leg backward, slightly past the midline, and draw a circle back to the center with legs together. Focus on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable; only the working leg moves.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628502797.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep your pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Stabilize the pelvis; no shifting or tilting.
2.Shoulders down and relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit long on the mat in a tall position. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale as you roll the spine back sequentially, lowering your upper body onto the mat; keep the feet pressed firmly into the mat at all times.
3.Inhale, using abdominal engagement to pull the body back, stacking the spine sequentially to return to the tall seated position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1772437741508.jpg","context":"1.Keep the legs together, extended forward, and locked.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Maintain steady breathing.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Do not lean back with a straight back.
2.Avoid shrugging or compensating with the shoulders and neck.
3.Keep both feet on the floor.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down with Back Extension
actionLibraryList.context:
1. Sit tall on the mat in a long-seated position. Inhale to prepare.
2. Exhale. Roll the spine down one vertebra at a time until the head and upper body are lying on the mat. At the same time, pull the straps back with your arms, opening the elbows out to the sides (elbows stay beside the torso). Keep both feet pressing into the mat throughout.
3. Inhale. Use abdominal contraction to draw the body back up. Finally, stack the spine up one vertebra at a time, straighten the arms, and return to a lengthened seated position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770687183714.jpg","context":"1.Keep the legs together, fully extended and locked.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid leaning backward with a straight back.
2.Keep the shoulders down; avoid compensating with the neck or shoulders.
3.Keep the feet on the ground at all times.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Leg Lift
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with hands and one knee forming a tripod base. Keep the spine neutral and the core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the glutes and posterior chain, and extend the working leg backward in a controlled manner until it is parallel with the body. Keep the pelvis level and avoid arching the lower back.
3.Inhale, maintain trunk stability, control the strap tension, and return the working leg to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770800883388.jpg","context":"1.Keep the pelvis level and stable.\n2.Maintain a neutral trunk position."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and extend the leg backward.
Inhale to control the return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching the lower back or rotating the pelvis; maintain a neutral position.
2.Do not swing the leg with momentum; focus on glute engagement.
3.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or overusing the upper limbs.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Leg Kick
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with three-point support (both hands and one knee). Keep the spine neutral, core engaged, and inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale and, keeping the torso stable, initiate from the hip to extend the working leg straight back until it is in line with the body.
3.Inhale and, maintaining control and band tension, bend the knee and hip to about 90°, keeping the pelvis steady.
4.Exhale to extend the leg back again to the parallel position, maintaining rhythm and control.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770715961988.jpg","context":"1.Keep the pelvis level and stable.\n2.Maintain a neutral torso position."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to drive the leg back with control.
Inhale to return with control.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching the lower back or rotating the pelvis out of neutral.
2.Do not kick the leg using momentum; focus on glute engagement.
3.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or overusing the upper body.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Leg Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with three points of support (both hands and one knee). Keep the spine neutral, core engaged, and inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, maintain a stable torso, and initiate the movement from the hip of the free leg. Using the glutes and hip adductors/abductors, draw 4 controlled circles outward, keeping the pelvis steady.
3.Inhale, reverse the direction and draw 4 small, even circles inward, maintaining control and consistent tension.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770715456628.jpg","context":"1.Keep the pelvis level and stable.\n2.Maintain a neutral torso throughout the movement."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to stabilize and drive the circular movement.
Inhale to control the motion and change direction.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching the lower back or rotating the pelvis out of neutral.
2.Avoid swinging the leg with momentum instead of initiating from the glutes.
3.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or overusing the upper body.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Leg Lift
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with hands and one knee forming a tripod base. Keep the spine neutral and the core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the glutes and posterior chain, and extend the working leg backward in a controlled manner until it is parallel with the body. Keep the pelvis level and avoid arching the lower back.
3.Inhale, maintain trunk stability, control the strap tension, and return the working leg to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770800883388.jpg","context":"1.Keep the pelvis level and stable.\n2.Maintain a neutral trunk position."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and extend the leg backward.
Inhale to control the return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching the lower back or rotating the pelvis; maintain a neutral position.
2.Do not swing the leg with momentum; focus on glute engagement.
3.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or overusing the upper limbs.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Leg Kick
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with three-point support (both hands and one knee). Keep the spine neutral, core engaged, and inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale and, keeping the torso stable, initiate from the hip to extend the working leg straight back until it is in line with the body.
3.Inhale and, maintaining control and band tension, bend the knee and hip to about 90°, keeping the pelvis steady.
4.Exhale to extend the leg back again to the parallel position, maintaining rhythm and control.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770715961988.jpg","context":"1.Keep the pelvis level and stable.\n2.Maintain a neutral torso position."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to drive the leg back with control.
Inhale to return with control.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching the lower back or rotating the pelvis out of neutral.
2.Do not kick the leg using momentum; focus on glute engagement.
3.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or overusing the upper body.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Leg Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with three points of support (both hands and one knee). Keep the spine neutral, core engaged, and inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, maintain a stable torso, and initiate the movement from the hip of the free leg. Using the glutes and hip adductors/abductors, draw 4 controlled circles outward, keeping the pelvis steady.
3.Inhale, reverse the direction and draw 4 small, even circles inward, maintaining control and consistent tension.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770715456628.jpg","context":"1.Keep the pelvis level and stable.\n2.Maintain a neutral torso throughout the movement."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to stabilize and drive the circular movement.
Inhale to control the motion and change direction.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching the lower back or rotating the pelvis out of neutral.
2.Avoid swinging the leg with momentum instead of initiating from the glutes.
3.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or overusing the upper body.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Arm Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with the arms at your sides. Exhale, lifting the arms up. As they approach eye level, internally rotate the arms and continue to circle them upward and outward.
2.When the arms reach shoulder height, inhale and slowly circle the arms downward and inward, returning them to the starting position at your sides.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628834011.jpg","context":"1.Maintain a neutral spine and engage the core.\n2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Maintain steady breathing.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Maintain a neutral spine; avoid sagging or compensating with the lower back.
2.Keep the shoulders down and relaxed.
3.Return slowly; avoid releasing too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Leg Extension
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Stand upright with a slight forward hip hinge, engaging the core and keeping the pelvis neutral and stable.
2.Inhale and engage the hip and knee to lift the leg sideways, raising the knee toward hip height while keeping the torso steady.
3.Exhale, extending the lifted leg backward in line with the torso by engaging the hips and glutes. Keep the pelvis level without rotation or lateral shift, and avoid excessive lower back compensation.
4.Inhale, controlling the leg along the same path to return, bending the hip and knee back to the starting position. Maintain core engagement and pelvis stability throughout.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628687693.jpg","context":"1.Maintain a neutral spine.\n2.Keep the knees aligned with the toes.\n3.Let the shoulders relax and naturally drop."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to kick the leg back.
Inhale to return it to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the torso steady.
2.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
3.Prevent pelvis rotation or lateral shift.

actionLibraryList.title: Squat with Biceps Curl
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, hinge at the hips as if sitting back into an invisible chair, while pulling the band toward your chest.
2.Inhale, keep the core engaged, slowly straighten the legs to stand, and controlledly extend the arms forward against the band’s resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628633945.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine neutral.\n2.Align knees with toes.\n3.Relax the shoulders, letting them drop naturally."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to pull.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the arms, glutes, and legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the knees from going too far past the toes.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed—no shrugging.
3.Avoid arching the lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Glutes Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lower the shoulder blades, and relax the neck. Bring one leg forward, bending at the hip and knee, and extend the other leg back with the thigh on the mat. Keep the hips facing forward without tilting.
2.Inhale to lengthen the spine and level the pelvis. Exhale as you hinge forward from the hips, resting the forearms or forehead lightly on the mat. Maintain the back hip extended forward without collapsing the lower back, feeling a stretch through the hips and glutes. Breathe evenly while holding the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691212351.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding any tilting."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch in the hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Maintain a neutral spine and avoid tilting the pelvis.

actionLibraryList.title: Hamstring Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit tall on the mat with legs extended together or hip-width apart. Flex the feet, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lengthen the spine, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare, reaching forward to hold the ankles. Exhale as you hinge from the hips into a forward fold, feeling a gentle stretch along the hamstrings. Maintain steady breathing while in the stretch.
3.Exhale with control to return to an upright seated position, keeping the feet flexed and the pelvis stable.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691228783.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Lengthen the spine as much as possible, avoiding a collapsed lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit with your hands by your sides for support, shoulders down away from the ears, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale as you laterally flex the body to one side, reaching the opposite arm over the head to eye level.
3.Inhale, keeping the core engaged, and return the body to center. Exhale and repeat on the other side, alternating sides.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689754482.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Anchor the sit bones on the mat, maintain a neutral pelvis, and avoid overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to powerfully side bend.
Inhale to return to neutral.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Keep the pelvis and core stable; do not let the lower back sag.
3.Maintain control; do not swing with momentum.
